---
name: Add status filter
about: Filter visible tickets by status without refreshing the page
title: "Add status filter"
labels: assessment
---

## Goal

Add status filtering for the ticket list.

## Requirements

Provide filters for:

- All
- Open
- In Progress
- Closed

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Filter controls are visible in the UI
- [ ] Selecting a status updates the visible tickets
- [ ] Choosing All shows every ticket
- [ ] Filtering works without a browser refresh
- [ ] Filter state is managed with React state

## Notes

Search does not need to be implemented in this issue, but leave room for combining both later.
